the epistle to the whole church militant in whatsoever part of the earth to who can I have so fit direct Christian reader this paraphrase of i upon the revelation as unto you who be the very and true posterity of those church to who the book itself be dedicate and for who instruction and comfort the say epistle be indict by the holy spirit and write by that great theologue JOHN the apostle who our master belove dear i doubt not but it will seem strange to many that any of my age call and literature shall have meddle with so obscure theological and high a subject but let my earnest desire by manifest the truth as well to teach myself as other serve for excuse consider also that where diverse other in our age have meddle with the interpretation of this book press with preoccupy opinion only to wrest and conform the meaning thereof to their particular and private passion i by the contrary protest that all my travail tend to square and conform my opinion to the true and sincere meaning thereof which cause move i to undertake this work not thereby to despise infinite other who to the glory of God and great comfort of his church have give it a great light already but rather that by oft peruse and dew consider thereof whereto this work have lead i i may be the better acquaint with the meaning of this book which i esteem a special cannon against the heretical wall of our common adversary the papist who I will wish to know that in this my paraphrase upon it i have use nothing of my own conjecture or of the authority of other but only have interpret it in that sense which may best agree with the method of the epistle and not be contradictory to itself the meaning whereof I expound partly by itself and partly by other part of the scripture as the work itself will bear witness and therefore this one thing i must crave of our adversary that they will not refute any part of my interpretation till they find out a more probable themselves agree with the whole context and where their conscience bear they witness that i speak the truth that they will yield unto it and glorify God therein and this be all the reward I crave for my pain but of one thing I must forewarn you Christian reader to wit that you may understand that it be for the make of the discourse more short and facile that I have make JOHN to be the speaker in all this paraphrase and not that I be so presumptuous foolish as to have mean thereby that my paraphrase be the only true and certain exposition of this epistle reject all other for although through speak in his person I be only bound and limit to use one and not diverse interpretation of every several place yet I condemn not other but rather allow they to interpret it diverse so be it agree with the analogy of faith with the method of the text as I say before for those three be observe it may fall out that diverse diverse expound one place and yet all be according to the truth and very meaning of the spirit of God as may easy be prove by the text itself for in the 17. chapter the angel expound to John the seven head of the beast that come out of the sea he say the seven head which thou see upon the beast be the seven hill and they be also seven king here you see one thing be expound in two very far different fashion and yet both true and therefore let wise man take their choice in these thing observe always these rule I have speak of as special for example this hebrew word geddon in the 16. chapter and six Phiale although I expound it to signify destruction by deceit as compose of (@) (@) (@) (@) (@) Gnarma and geddon which may very well agree with the history because it be the name of the place say John where the wicked be assemble together by the allure and deceit of Satan and his three spirit of devil to make war with the faithful be all destroy by God and so their destruction come and be procure by deceit yet other interpret it to signify destruction by water as compose of (@) (@) (@) (@) (@) harma and geddon which also may very well agree with the history for water indeed in this book signify oft many people and nation as appear by the very text in the 17. chapter and other take it to be a allusion to the destruction that joshua make of God enemy upon the hill of Mageddon and therefore to be compose of (@) (@) (@) (@) (@) which be call a hill and Mageddon which may also very well agree with the history and as i speak of this so i speak the like of gog and Magog in the 20. chapter and of all other ambiguous place in this book it rest then that what you find amiss in this paraphrase you impute it to my lack of year and learning and what you find worthy to be allow in it that you attribute the full praise thereof to GOD to who only all praise appertain farewell the argument of this whole epistle this book or epistle of revelation be call in doubt aswell for the incertainty of the author as also for the canonicalnesse of the book itself by sundry of the ancient and special by Eusebe for solve whereof I need not to insist since it be both receive now of all christian and also diverse of the Neoteriques in special Beza in his preface upon it have handle that matter sufficient already so that this doubt only rest now in man that this book be so obscure and allegorique that it be in a manner unprofitable to be teach or interpret whereunto I will short make answer and then go forward to set down the method of the same and therefore to make a deduction from the beginning let we understand in what several or principal part the whole scripture may be divide in and than which of they this book be how soon Adam be make perfect in his creation and have the choice of life and death good and evil do by his horrible defection make choice of death and cast off life and by that mean infect his whole posterity with double sin to wit original and actual God notwithstanding have such a love to mankind as be his most noble workmanship and creature make to his own likeness and image that he select a church among they who first because of their weakness and incredulity he with his own mouth teach and next instruct and raise up notable man among they to be their ruler who he endue with such excellent gift as not only their example in life preach but also by miracle they strengthen and confirm their faith but lest this ministry of man shall make they to depend only upon their mouth forget he and make god of they he at length out of his own mouth give they his law which he cause they to put in writ and retain still among they and than lest they shall forget and neglect the same he raise up godly ruler as well temporal as spiritual who by their holy life and work of miracle revive and strengthen the law in their heart but see that notwithstanding all this they cast themselves headlong in the gulf of vice such be the unthankful and repine nature of man he raise up prophet as especial jeremy and Daniel to accuse they of their sin and by vision to forewarn they of the time to come whereby the godly may turn and arm themselves and the wicked may be make inexcusable and thus much for the old testament but then God see that notwithstanding this there creep in such a general corruption among they that scarce one may be find that bow not his knee to Baal he then by his unsearchable wisdom incarnate his eternal son and word the lord JESUS who by his death and passion accomplish the faith of the father who salvation be by the believe in he to come as also make a open and patent way of grace to all the world thereafter and then as upon a new world and a new church God fatherly care to mankind be renew but in a more favourable form because he look upon the merit of his dear son then first Christ with his own mouth do instruct man and confirm his doctrine by miracle and second raise up the apostle to give the law of faith confirm it by their life and miracle and last that notwithstanding this defection be beginning to creep in again he inspire one of they to wit JOHN to write this book that he may thereby even as jeremy and Daniel do in the old law aswell rebuke they of their sin as by forewarn they to arm they against the great tentation that be to come after then of itself it prove how profitable this book be for this age see it be the last revelation of god will and prophesy that ever be or shall be in the world for we shall have no more prophecy nor miracle hereafter but must content ourselves with the law and prophecy already give as Christ in his parable of Lazarus and the rich man teach now as to the method this holy epistle be direct to the seven church of Asia Minor who he name and write to particular in the first three chapter of the same and under their name to all their true successor the whole church militant in the World the whole matter may be divide in six part to wit the praise or dispraise of every one of these church according to their merit wherein they merit good or evil what way they ought to reform themselves and this be contain in the three first chapter and to make they inexcusable in case they slide again he show the estate of the whole church militant in their time he tell they what it shall be until the end of the world and what it shall be when it be triumphant and immortal after the dissolution these three last part be declare by vision in the rest of the epistle first the present estate of the church then and what it shall be thereafter unto the late day be summary declare by the first six of the seven seal in the six and seven chapter and afterward more at large by the seven trumpet that come out of the seven seal in the 8. 9 10. 11. chapter and because through tyranny and abuse of the popedom popery be the great temptation since Christ first come or that shall be unto his last therefore he special insist more at large and clear in the declaration and paint forth of the same by vision of the woman in the wilderness and of the beast that rise out of the sea and the earth in the 12. 13. and 14. chapter and then to comfort man that may otherwise despair chap. 15.16 because of the greatness of that temptation he declare by the next follow vision of the phial what plague shall light upon the pope and his follower next he describe he again chap. 17.18.19 chap. 20. far clear than any time before and likewise his ruin together with the sorrow of the earth and joy of heaven therefore and then to inculcate and engrave the better the foresay vision in the heart and memory of man he in a vision make a short sum and recapitulation of they to wit of the present estate of the church then and what it shall be thereafter unto the day of judgement together with a short description of the say day and last he describe by a vision the glorious reward of they who constant persist in the truth resist all the temptation which he have forspeak to wit he describe the bless estate of the holy and eternal jerusalem and church triumphant and so with a short and pithy conclusion make a end a paraphrase upon the revelation of the apostle s. the father have direct his son and word JESUS CHRIST to send down a angel or minister to i John his servant and by he to reveal unto i certain thing which be short to come to pass to the effect in read and understand this prophecy and conform themselves thereunto in time for in very short space it will be fulfil @ I be direct to declare the same special to you the seven church of Asia with who be grace and peace from the eternal the father and from the holy spirit @ and JESUS CHRIST that faithful witness the first bear of the dead the mighty king of the world and head of his church who for the love he bear we have make we innocent by his blood in the work of redemption @ to he than we who he have make spiritual king and priest in honour and holiness and ordain to serve and praise his father give all glory and power for ever so be it @ assure yourselves of his come again from heaven in all glory and all eye shall see he yea the wicked shall be compel to acknowledge that it be even very he who so they do persecute Christ crucify and the whole world shall have a feel before he of their unthankfulness so be it @ I be eternal say the lord before who all thing which be or be be present and I be only the worker of all I who ever be and still be shall sure come again according to my promise 1. cor. 2. and as I be eternal and true so I be almighty preordinate all thing before all beginning @ I John your brother in the flesh John banish to Pathmos for the truth write the revelation and companion with you aswell in the service of Christ as in the patient suffering of the cross be for that word of God and witness of Christ whereof I speak so persecute that for safety of my life I be constrain to fly all alone to the solitary i will of Pathmos 10 then be I bereave in spirit upon the Sunday which be hallow to the lord then hear I behind i turn about and take heed the mighty voice of the lord as a trumpet because he be to declare the estate of the battle of the and firm continuance even so as thy last work be better than the first 20 yet some few thing have I to lay to thy charge to wit that thou suffer a woman like to jezebel in wickedness and idolatry who call herself a prophetess to teach and seduce my servant to commit fornication and filthiness of the flesh and to eat of thing immolate unto idol 21 yet give I her a time to repent from her filthiness but she will not 22 therefore lo I shall cast she into a bed to wit I shall destroy she in the puddle of her sin and I shall trouble with great affliction all they who commit adultery to wit spiritual adultery with she if they repent not of their evil work in time 23 and I will kill and destroy her son to wit all the follower of her doctrine that all the church and faithful may know i to be the searcher out of the secret of all heart and the just renderer and recompencer of every man according to his work 24 but I say unto the rest of you who be at thyatire who have not receive that false doctrine nor know not the depth nor secret of Satan or wickedness whereof the other false do purge themselves I will not lay any other burden upon you then that which already constant you bear 25 but that which you have hold it out valiant until my come again 26 for unto he who be victor and bear out to the end that burden which I lay upon he I will give power over nation to wit he shall triumph over the world 27 and he shall rule they with a iron rod and they shall be break like vessel of earth according as I have receive the power from my father 28 and I shall give unto he the morning star for as the morning star shine bright than the rest so shall he shine bright in glory then his fellow 29 he that have a ear let he hear what the spirit say to the church chap. 3 argument admonition and you live and yet be dead for your faith be fruitless @ be watchful then and sleep no long in negligence and careless security but strengthen again that which be die in you to wit revive your zeal and fervency which be wax cold and almost quench for sure I have not find your work so holy and pure as they be able to abide a trial before the face of God 3 remember then what thou have once receive and time prepare @ yet have you some few head and notable person in Sardis who have not defile their garment to wit corrupt their work as the rest have do and therefore they shall go with i be make white to wit be make innocent by my merit for they be worthy thereof @ and the victor shall be clothe with a white garment of innocence by imputation neither shall I wipe his name out of the book of life but shall avow he to be one of i before my father and his angel @ he that have a ear let he hear what the spirit say to the church @ but to the angelor pastor of the church of philadelphia write thou to wit I have make the way of grace patent unto thou which door no man can shut because I have reserve the secret power of election and reprobation only to myself and this favour will I show you because you retain some good and virtuous thing among you and have keep my word and have not be ashamed of my name nor deny the same @ loe therefore I will make subject unto thou these who be the retain sure to the end that good which be in thou lest another do receive thy crown and reward 12 for I will make the victor a pillar in the temple of my god to wit a special and steadfast instrument and the name of the city of my god which be new jerusalem to wit the holy and bless number of saint and angel which come down from heaven from my god to wit be short and certain to come down by the general compeir at the latter day and I shall also write on he my own name for I shall apply my general redemption of mankind to he in special and so I shall write my new name upon he to wit of redeemer and saviour which name I have late acquire through my passion death and rise again 13 he that have a ear let he hear what the spirit say unto the church 14 and to the angel or pastor of the church of Laodicea Laodicea write thou thus say the amen to wit he that be whole and perfect holy and true in all his promise that saithful witness who be the begin of the workmanship of God as well because he be that word which do create all and so be their beginning for that they all receive their beginning and be from he as because the unite of the manhood with the godhead in his person be the most excellent and so the beginning that be the chief or first in preeminence of all the work of God 15 I know thy work say he to wit that thou be neither hot nor cold will to God thou be either hot or cold to wit either fervent and pure in the truth or altogether cold and ignorant that be see and confess thy ignorance and slackness that thou may be instruct in the same judgement against Laodicea 16 but thou be lukewarm and neither hot nor cold and so inexcusable and therefore as lukewarm liquor provoke vomit so will I spew thou out of my mouth 17 for thou say and think thyself to be wealthy and great enrich and lack nothing but thou know not thyself to be spiritual in misery and wretchedness poor blind and naked of the grace and favour of God 18 I will wish thou to buy of i gold purge by the fire that thou may thereby be make true rich I mean I will wish thou to conquer by true repentance and earnest prayer the word and truth of God which because it can receive no filth or spot and be able to abide the trial David proper in his psalm compare to gold purge by the fire which will make thou rich in all spiritual grace I will also wish thou to clothe thyself with a white garment to wit with innocence and righteousness that the shame of thy nakedness and uncleanness appear not and to anoint thy eye with a eye-salue that thou may clear see from whence thou have fall 19 but despair thou not for these my sharp word for those who I love I reprove and fatherly chasten take up therefore again zealous the right way to salvation and repent thou earnest of thy former iniquity 20 loe I stand at the door and knock for I offer myself unto you by my ambassador and my word in their mouth whosoever hear my voice and open the door to wit whosoever hear my voice and yield thereunto due the figurative represent of those thing that be to come after and that first voice which speak unto i before loud as a trumpet and be the voice of JESUS CHRIST speak unto i and say mount up thither for I be to show thou those thing that be to be do hereafter @ then be I immediate bereave in spirit for the eye of my earthly and gross body can not have see and comprehend those heavenly and spiritual mystery and lo I do see a throne set in heaven and do see one sit thereon to wit GOD the father in all glory and majesty @ and he that sit thereon be like in colour to the jasper and sardine stone green as the jasper to represent his everlasting flourish without decay and fiery red as the sardine to signify his great brightness and consume power who be the trier and separater of the elect from the reprobate and the rainbow colour like the emerald do compass he round about to testify thereby that as after the deluge he make the rainbow a sacrament of the promise make to Noah so this rainbow which now I do see compass his throne shall serve for a sure sacrament that he will never suffer his elect to perish but will always and at all time be compass with a great care and watchfulness over they Greene it be as the emerald to signify the continuance without cease of his care as the emerald comfort the sight so be this sacrament a unspeakable comfort unto the elect in their troublesome day @ and about his throne be four and twenty other seat and I see four and twenty elder or ecclesiastical ruler sit thereupon clothe with white garment and have crown of gold upon their head these be the twelve patriarch and then the twelve apostle who for that they have be the special teacher both of the old and new law to the salvation aswell of jew as of gentile be set in seat about his throne for glory and clothe with white garment for their innocence and brightness and crown with crown of gold in token of their victory over Satan and the flesh and of their glorious reward therefore @ and from his throne go forth thunder lightning and terrible voice to represent the great severity and terribleness of his judgement denounce by the old law and execute on the wicked and there be seven lamp of burn fire before his throne which be the infinite mighty and flame bright holy spirit resemble the love and light of the new law of the gospel of Christ @ and there be a sea of glass like unto crystal before his throne for that as in a glass he clear see even all the secret action and cogitation of all in the world describe here by the sea which be ever before his face for nothing can be hide from his presence and prescience and though in lustre and glance the world be like the lively fountain of water which be the faithful daily spring and flow with good work by fruitful faith yet be it indeed without motion or liquor dead and like glass whensoever the lord Jehovah do thunder his judgement upon it and in the midst of the throne and about the same be four beast their four hinder part be in the midst of it their shoulder bear it up and their head and wing without and about the same and these beast be full of eye behind and before these be the holy cherubim the high degree of angel Ezech. 10.12 four in number as well because of their four quality to execute his will as you shall hear hereafter as for that the lord direct they when it please he to all the four corner of the world and be as it be his four wind to blow that be to execute either favour or justice in whatsoever place he appoint they they be about his throne and as it be sustain the same testify thereby that they be most excellent of all other and (@) (@) (@) (@) (@) the pillar or footstool of his glory their number of eye before and behind signify their certain knowledge of thing past as to come commit to their charge together with their continual vigilancy to execute God commandment @ and the first beast be like a lion the second like a calf the three be face like a man and the four be like a fly eagle hereby represent their excellent quality in the execution of the lord decree to wit great power courage patience and strength to travel how oft and how much they shall be command great wisdom and a wonderful swiftness in the execution thereof @ and every one of these beast have six wing in circuit these be the six wing esay speak of esay 6.8 two at their arm to signify their great celerity in accomplish god commandment two to cover their face with to testify that the glory of God be so bright and his majesty so great as the very angel his most excellent creature be not able to behold the same and two at their foot as well to wipe the filth of the earth off they after they have be here below teach we thereby that although they be oft in the world by the direction of their creator yet can the world infect they with her sinfulness and corruption as also to let we know that they be so far in glory above all man live in the earth as it be impossible to we with corporal eye to behold the least part of their glorious brightness without a veil even as it be to they to behold the glory of the almighty and within they be all full of eye to represent their incessant look on God which come from that inward and inestimable love they bear unto he which also they express in their continual sing of these word holy holy holy be that threefold lord God almighty who ever be now be and shall come again replenish with all fullness of glory and power @ and when these beast be give all glory honour and thanks to he that sit on the throne to he I say who be present to declare unto you within be write the plain exposition and the very proper name of all thing which these vision do represent which be enclose there to signify that the lord have not permit i to manifest the same to the world for the time thereof be not come yet which book be seal with seven seal aswell to keep every part thereof unrevealed to any as also to give the great certainty that these thing shall come to pass which be prophesy therein @ and I see a strong angel proclaim with a loud voice who be worthy to open this book and to loose the seal thereof @ but there can none be find worthy to do it neither in heaven nor in earth nor beneath the earth no not to look on it much less to open it for neither angel nor devil either know or dare meddle with the high mystery of God and thing future except so far as please he to commit and reveal unto they @ then weep I very sore that none can be find worthy to open and read that book no not to look upon the same for I be very sorrowful that I can not have it reveal unto i @ at last one of the elder say unto i weep not loe the lion of the tribe of juda have prevail to wit he who be come of juda and have admirable force in his flesh derive from the tribe of juda by which he overcome sin death and hell and be the root of David for David be his figure and fore-beer in the flesh be worthy and only worthy to open the book and loose the seal thereof @ and then I take heed and behold I do see in the midst of the throne and the four beast a second person of the trinity sit with God and in the midst of the elder as a man and our brother a lamb stand like as he have be slay to signify that once indeed he be slay but have rise again and have seven horn and seven eye represent the innumerable time mighty and holy spirit of God which after his resurrection he send out through the whole earth to direct instruct and rule the same by his providence and power @ this lamb than come and take the book out of the right hand of he that do sit on the throne @ and so soon as he have take the book in his hand these four beast and these four and twenty elder fall upon their face before the lamb and adore he and every one of they have in his hand harp and golden phial full of sweet odour these be the prayer of the saint which the four beast comprehend all the degree of angel and the four and twenty elder comprehend the whole church as well militant as triumphant perceive that CHRIST be to reveal all the tentation which be to fall upon the earth and church before the latter day do power forth aswell on the church triumphant part thanksgiving that by the reveal or open of the book he arm the militant church to resist all the tentation contain therein as also on the church militant part to pray he to hasten the end and dissolution for the hasten whereof all creature sigh and groan to their creator every one of these beast and elder present their own prayer unto he who sit on the throne to teach we as he be mediator and therefore our prayer must be offer unto he only that so there be no intercessor between he and we but every one of we must present our own prayer before he after the example of the beast and elder these prayer be enclose in harp to signify the sweet and please sound that faithful prayer make in the ear of God they be enclose in golden phial to teach we that acceptable prayer must come from a undefiled heart and pure as gold and they themselves be call incense because their smell be pleasant and sweet like incense in the nostril of God exod. 30.7 this do the incense at the sacrifice in the old law signify and figurate and of this incense speak David in his psalm psal 141.2 @ and they to wit the four and twenty elder do sing a new canticle for the matter of their canticle to wit the accomplishment of the mystery of redemption be new psal 144. and ever aught to be new and fresh in the heart of all they that will be account thankful their song then be this thou be worthy o lord to receive the book and open the seal thereof for thou have be slay though innocent and by thy precious blood have redeem we to God thy father and have choose we out of all tribe tongue people and nation aswell jew as gentile 10 and thou have make we king and priest spiritual to our god and we shall reign over the earth at the last and general judgement and as king shall be participant of the glory of the holy and new city jerusalem 11 then I behold and hear round about the throne the beast and the elder the voice of many angel to the number of many thousand thousand dan. 7.10 to wit innumerable legion of they 12 who say all with a loud voice the lamb who be slay be worthy to have all power riches wisdom strength honour glory and blessing for ever 13 I also hear all creature in heaven in earth and beneath the earth and in the sea even all that be in they I hear say in one voice unto he that sit upon the throne and unto the lamb be blessing glory honour and power for ever and ever and the four beast say amen and the four and twenty elder fall on their face and adore he that live for ever and ever chap. 5 argument the open of the first six seal the spread of the evangel signify by the white horse in the first seal the great persecution by the red horse in the second the number of diverse heresy by the black in the three the popedom and tyranny thereof by the pale in the four the complaint of the saint and their deliverance promise their bless estate in the mean time in the five the day of judgement and the terribleness thereof in the six after this I look to see when the lamb open the first seal and lo I hear one of the four beast for they be appoint to assist i in the time of these vision as the most excellent creature of God and his voice be like a thunder make i awake with terror to take heed to these great and terrible prophecy which God be to declare unto i and he say come and see @ then I look and do see a white horse and he that sit on he have a bow in his hand Zach. 1.8 Zach. 6.2 3. and a crown give unto he and he come forth a victor to win and overcome this man come on the white horse be the come and incarnation of our bright and innocent saviour arm with a bow for ever since his come till now and a space hereafter the dart and arrow of God to wit the holy spirit by the preach of the gospel do subdue and bring the world under his subjection and take vengeance of his enemy his crown be give to he by his father in token of his victory over the second death and as king of the catholic church to crown the faithful conversion of the gentile and so he come forth a victor over Satan and to overcome by once convert a great part of the world to the true knowledge of God this mystery be already begin but be not yet accomplish @ and when he open the second seal @ loe there come forth a red horse and there be power give to he that sit on he to take away peace from the earth that every one may slay one another and there be give he for that purpose a great sword for with the spread of the evangel and root of the truth in the heart of the nation persecution of the body by the civil sword in the second seal continuation of true pastor after the martyr shall a bloody persecution of tyrant by the civil sword be join which be mean by the rider on the red horse but notwithstanding the evangel shall spread and flourish for such be the power of God resist the pride of man that under the cross the purity of the truth most flourish in the church @ and when he open the three seal the three beast say unto i come and see and lo I do see a black horse and he that sit upon he have balance in his hand @ and I hear a voice from among the four beast say a measure of wheat for one penny and three measure of barley for one penny but wine and oil harm thou not for after that this first mystery shall be accomplish not only dearth and famine shall ensue the contempt of the truth but God shall permit Satan to tempt and vex his church with a cloud of diverse and dangerous heresy which may be mean by the rider on the black horse for the blackness and darkness of they heresy mean in the three seal shall obscure the light of the gospel but yet God to assure we that he will never forget his own speak from his throne comfort we thereby that although as the balance and measure signify good man shall bescant who be the fine wheat and barley of his harvest Luke 3 yet some shall there be that shall not bow their knee to Baal no not in straight time that shall come after and always give we assurance that the word and truth of God which be a eternal oil and comfortable vine shall never be destroy nor any way corrupt in spite of all the malice of Satan in his instrument @ and when he open the four seal the four beast say unto i come and see @ then I behold and lo I do see a pale horse and the name of he that sit upon he be death this be the great and heavy plague for after that the persecution and heresy shall take a end and that infirmity and coldness have into the church the popedom be mean by the pale horse in the four seal of heresy and civil tyranny then shall God redouble his former plague by permit Satan to erect a tyranny compose of both these former plague for it shall be full of heresy like the one and full of civil and temporal tyranny like the other and therefore because it bring with it all manner of death both of body and soul the rider be just call death as the fountain of all the sort of the same and the paleness of the horse be correspondent in all point to the quality of the rider for as the rider be call death so the colour of paleness represent the same and as the rider quality be compose of heresy and tyranny so the colour of pale be compose chief of black and red and hell follow after he to the utter damnation of he and his follower and power be give he over the four part of the earth to wit the rest who be not overcome by the other three rider for all they who be not mark by the white horse nor kill in body by the red nor kill in soul by the black be kill both in body and soul by this last and as he have power of destroy thus give he over the four part of the earth so by four plague special do he execute the same to wit by sword hunger death and the beast of the earth these plague allude to the plague mention in the canticle of Moses for this tyranny shall begin with persecution scarcity of true pastor and worship the cruelty of the pope tyranny this persecution shall cause a hunger and great scarcity of the true worship of God this hunger shall breed a second and eternal death and this tyranny shall then end with a cruel and bloody persecution of the body then ever be before which shall be so barbarous that it be compare in this vision to the execution use by wild beast upon offender and shall spare no degree sex nor age no more than beast do @ but when he open the five seal I do see under the altar the soul of they that be slay for the word of God and for his testimony which they maintain 10 and they cry with a loud voice say how long will thou delay o lord since thou be holy and true to revenge and judge our blood upon they that dwell on the earth for this last persecution do enter so fierce into the world and do make so great a number of martyr that their soul lie under the altar to wit in the safeguard of JESUS CHRIST who be the only altar Hose. 14.3 whereupon and by who it be only lawful to we hebr. 13.15 to offer the sacrifice of our heart and lip to wit our humble prayer to God the father do pray and their blood do cry to heaven and crave at the hand of their father a just revenge of their torment upon the wicked and therewith a hasten of the general dissolution for the delivery of their brother who do remain yet alive 11 then white robe be give to every one of they and it be say unto they and they be will to rest and have patience for a short space unto the time the number of their fellow servant to God and brother companion in the cross be fulfil who be also to be slay as they be already this sure aught to be a wonderful and inestimable comfort to all the church militant since by this seal we be assure that both the soul of the martyr so soon as their body be kill shall immediate be reward with perpetual and bright glory in heaven not go into any other place by the way which be signify by the white robe as also that so soon as their number shall be complete which shall be within a short space God shall then crave a full account at their persecutor hand and then as the one number shall receive a full and eternal glory in body and soul the other shall receive a full torment in soul and body to the clear shine of his justice in the one and his mercy in the other the earth the sea or any tree @ and I do see one angel go up from the rise of the sun have the seal of the live God and he cry with a loud voice to the four angel that have power give they to harm the earth and the sea @ say harm not the earth nor the sea nor the tree until we have mark the servant of God on the forehead these angel four in number because they sit upon the four corner of the earth know they be mark in so eminent a place in the general destruction and so spare they assure we thereby that he have such a care over his elect as he have provide for they before hand even as he do for I may be assure that a number aswell of the gentile as of the jew shall be save loe he show i a number so great as I can not reckon the same and it be compose of certain out of every nation tribe who be preserve and come from that great affliction which be represent to thou in some of the seal and they have wash their garment and make they white in the blood of the lamb for they by virtue of his death be make righteous by imputation who blood be the only and full purgation of we from our sin 15 and therefore they be before the throne of GOD and serve he day and night in his temple to wit they without any intermission contemplate his glory and ever serve he by continual thanksgiving and praise his name in heaven which be his eternal and celestial temple and he that sit on the throne shall dwell with they for they shall never be separate from his presence 16 and they shall be no more a hungry or thirsty nor the sun or any heat shall trouble they 17 for the lamb who be in the midst of the throne to wit coequal in power with his father he shall feed they and guide they to the lively fountain of water to wit they shall feed of that spiritual and lively bread and drink of that spiritual and lively water even himself John 4.14 which water he promise to the Samaritane woman at the well and GOD shall wipe all tear from their eye for he shall both by the greatness of their present joy put quite out of their memory all the sorrow of their former trouble and shall also give they eternal joy which shall never be mix with any kind of trouble or fear so shall they not be molest with the vehemency of the sun or any other heat which signify great trouble and sorrow chap. 8 argument the open of the seven seal the seven trumpet come out of it the effect of the prayer of open the seven seal there be silence in heaven almost half a hour aswell to let i know that he have once already summary declare the whole thing which be to come after as by silence a while to give i occasion to meditate upon that vision which I have see to the effect that afterward I may the better understand the more particular rehearsal thereof which now under another vision and form be to be declare unto i by the open of the seven seal @ and I see seven angel stand before God to execute whatsoever thing it shall please he to command they and by his direction there be seven trumpet give unto they that by these trumpet they may with one majesty denounce to the world such plague as they be by the command of God to pour forth upon it @ then another angel come and stand before the altar have a golden censer in his hand and there be much incense give unto he that he may offer up the prayer of the saint upon the golden altar that be before the throne @ and the smoke of the incense which be the prayer of the saint mount up from the hand of the angel to the sight of God @ then the angel take this new empty censer and fill it again with the fire of the altar and do cast it down on by his office of mediator he be to do as follow he have a golden censer in his hand for he keep the censer wherein be contain the incense which the saint give he to wit their prayer to be offer up to God to assure we that our prayer be offer in that form be ever acceptable the effect whereof do appear by the angel fill again the censer with the fire of the altar and cast it on the earth wherewith be join the noise you hear of for these prayer procure that their mediator shall out of his golden box to wit out of his treasure of power send down the fire of the altar to wit the holy spirit which remain with he to make thunder voice lightning and earthquake to wit to give again the law by renew the efficacy of the gospel in the heart of the faithful allude to the give of the old law whereof trumpet prepare themselves to blow for although they be before direct yet be they not permit to execute their office no more than the four angel who stay the four wind while Christ have strengthen and arm his own as be say to assure we that ever before any great temptation he will make the back of the elect ready and able to bear such burden as he be to lay upon they 1. cor. 10.13 @ then the first angel blow and there be a great hail and fire mix with blood and this storm be cast down upon the earth whereupon follow that the three part of the tree be wither and burn up and all green grass be wither and burn up for the first plague which have already begin to work shall be mix partly of hail which be heresy for as hail shower by the harm they do to the corn make they to become dear so heresy make the true harvest of the lord to become scant this hail or heresy and spiritual persecution be join with the sword and persecution of the flesh which be signify by the fire and the blood this fiery and two edge trial shall make the three part to wit a part but not the great number of tree to wit of renown man and all green grass to wit all they that be not well found and strong in the so become wither and unprofitable @ then the second angel blow and there fell as it have be a great hill all burn in fire and this hill be cast into the sea and the three part of the sea become blood @ and the three part of the live creature in the sea be slay and the three part of the ship therein do perish for after that this former plague shall have a end and yet the world not turn themselves from their iniquity than the second shall follow which be the corporal plague of persecution signify by the red horse in the second seal more ample dilate here this great heap of fiery persecution like a mountain of fire shall make the three part or a certain number of people and nation which be signify by the sea or many water to overflow in blood for as it be say of the same in the second scale they shall slay one another for even among themselves to wit among the wicked shall be great bloodshed and war for the three or a certain number of all sort of live thing shall die to wit no sort of man shall be exempt from this trouble but especial a number and not the great part of the faithful shall be persecute which be signify by the ship for even as ship on a stormy sea seek a haven so the faithful among the wicked of the world toss here and there resist every wave strive in despite of many contrarious wind to attain to that haven where at last cast their anchor they be free from all worldly tempest and dwell there eternal in a perpetual calmness 10 then the three angel blow and there fall from heaven a great star burn like a torch and it fall upon the three part of river and fountain of water and the name of the star be wormwood and the three part of the river and fountain be turn into wormwood and many man die for the bitterness of the water this be that same plague which be signify by the black horse and his rider to wit a cloud of defection and apostatical heresy here signify by a great star burn like a torch for it shall have a great light but like the light of a torch for as the torch and candlelight be false to the eye and make the colour to appear otherwise then they be and be make dim by the brightness of the sun so shall this light of false doctrine mask iniquity for a space and make it seem to be the truth unto the time the true light of God obfuscat and blind it these heresy shall be strong in deceit than those before for they shall seduce the very pastor and spiritual magistrate which be signify by the star fall in a part of the fountain of water for these man be the worldly fountain whereout the rest of the faithful by the bucket of their ear draw that spring of heavenly liquor 11 this star be call wormwood for as wormwood be a bitter herb what great bitterness can be to the soul of man then to procure the wrath of the almighty through such a horrible fall and as it turn a part of the pastor and make they to become of bitter quality like itself so their bitterness do slay with the second death a great number of man to wit their disciple and follower 12 then the four angel blow and the three part of the sun the three part of the moon and three part of the star be strike so that the three part of they to wit of their light be obscure and the three part of the day and the three part of the night be obscure to wit the three part of their light be darken for after that one part of the pastor shall make horrible defection it shall fall out that the whole church visible shall be blind with some error but not yet make a full defection which be signify by the obscure of a part of the light of the sun moon and star to wit of all degree of spiritual magistrate so that by their general weakness in some point a part of the meaning of the gospel shall be false interpret which be mean by the light of the day and of the night for as the cloud by day and the pillar of fire by night do guide the people of Israel through the desert to the land of promise so will this light shine both day and night in our soul conduct we out through the wilderness of this world to that spiritual land of promise where we with our God shall glorious reign in all eternity this four blast be also a part of the three seal 13 and I see and hear a other angel fly through the midst of heaven and say with a loud voice woe woe woe to the inhabitant of the earth for the harm that shall be do unto they by the last three blast of the angel trumpet for the last three plague shall be exceed great which that I may the better note and take great heed unto God wake i up and make i see a angel fly through the midst of heaven with celerity aswell to forewarn the holy angel and saint of these three plague so far in greatness above the rest as to signify by his swift fly that they be hasty and within short space to be put in execution and the number of woe to wit which he cry be answerable to the number of plague which be hereafter to be declare chap. 9 argument in the five trumpet the heresy cause a great blindness and ignorance whereof come the ecclesiastical papistical order signify by the grasshopper breed out of the smoke and their power and quality their king and head the pope and his style in the next trumpet the beginning of his decay signify by the lose of the four angel at Euphrates the remedy he use for the same by hound out the jesuit signify by the horse in the vision their quality signify by their breastplate the pope and turk his gather to destroy the church signify by a great army of horse the pope be the plague for break of the first table and the Turk for break of the second then the five angel blow and I see the star that fall out of heaven upon earth for it be to be note that all these plague do fall out of heaven upon the earth to teach we by his justice permit amos 3.6 esay 45.7 direct order and restrain it I do see it get the key of the bottomless pit which be give unto it for this cloud of heresy speak of in the three trumpet and three seal by process of time do breed this bastard tyranny whereof I speak in the four seal and so it bring from hell by the open of the bottomless pit whereof it gate the key to wit by the assistance and device of Satan it breed such plague as follow @ first by open of the pit come forth a great smoke like the smoke of a furnace to wit it do breed such a darkness and ignorance in the mind of man as the sun and the air be obscure to wit the light of the true represent by the darken of the sun and so in place of live under and by the true and clear air of the truth the world shall live under and by the bastard and dark air of false doctrine @ and out of this smoke come grasshopper upon the earth for this great blindness shall breed a multitude of diverse order of ecclesiastical person as well monk and friar as other but all agree in one heretical religion these be grasshopper because they breed of that filthy smoke of heresy even as grasshopper breed of corrupt air they be ever teach false doctrine with their mouth which carry with it as great destruction to the soul of man as the mouth of grasshopper do to the green grass and herb and the earth shall be overload with multitude of they even as grasshopper sometime come in great heap and overcharge the face of a whole country and like power be give to they as have the earthly scorpion for as the scorpion sting be not feel sore at first and be long in work and impossible to be heal but by the oil of a dead scorpion so the poison of the soul can be perceive by the receiver at the first but be long in operation for by piece and piece they infect the world with heresy and open not all their pack at first and the world shall never be free from their heresy unto the utter destruction of these false teacher themselves @ and it be say unto they or they be forbid to harm the grass or any green thing or any tree but only these man that have not the mark of God in their forehead for though earthly grasshopper when they swarm in heap do destroy all green grass or tree yet God shall so bridle the rage of these spiritual grasshopper that they shall have no power to pervert the elect of whatsoever degree or sort compare to green grass and fruitful tree but their power shall extend only upon they that bear not the mark or seal of God upon their forehead and as wither and unfruitful stick be ready for the fire @ but they shall have no power to slay they to wit they shall not discover to the world their great blasphemy at the first as I say before but they shall torment they for the space of five month and their torment shall be like the torment that a man suffer be sting by a scorpion to wit they shall by piece and piece infect they with spiritual poison and as I have say already they shall not feel the smart thereof while the second death make they to feel the same this torment shall endure five month that be the time limit they by God which allude to the five month in summer when grasshopper be this form of speech do declare the continue of the metaphor @ and in these day man shall seek death and shall not find the same and man shall desire to die but death shall fly from they for than begin the troublesome time of the late day the misery whereof I hear our master while he be yet on the earth declare in these word that I have now repeat @ and the figure of these locust be like unto the horse prepare for the war to signify that their form of practice and policy shall be so worldly wise that they shall lack nothing pertain to the set forth of their intent more than a horse of service which be curious bard seat and prepare for go forth to the battle and they have crown like crown of gold upon their head for they shall pretend to be holy like the elder who for their reward gate crown of pure gold set upon their head as you hear before and so shall outward glance in a hypocritical holiness and their face be like the face of man and the face of man signify reason as man be a reasonable creature the likeness then of their face unto man signify that they shall by curious argument pretend reason to maintain their false doctrine but it shall be but a counterfeit resemble of reason indeed even as their crown be like unto gold but be not gold indeed @ and they have hair like the hair of woman for as the hair of woman be a special part of their allure beauty so they have such allure heresy whereby they make the way of heaven so easy by their help to whosoever how wicked soever they be that will use the same as they allure they to commit spiritual adultery with they and they have tooth like lion tooth for as the lion be strong in the mouth and so may do great harm with his tooth then any other beast so all these that will not be persuade with their show prepare like horse for the war with their crown like crown of gold with their face like the face of man nor with their hair like the hair of woman they shall be persecute by the power of their mouth to wit by their threaten and thunder curse @ and they have breast plate like breastplate of iron for they shall have to back this their authority the assistance of prince who maintain of they shall appear unto the world strong as iron and the sound of their wing be like the sound of chariot run with many horse unto the war for as the grassehopper make in the hot time of the year and the day a great sound with their wing so these shall be make so strong and fearful by their brestplate like iron as what they be in the height of their day shall decree it shall have such a majesty and fearfulness as the terrible noise of many horse and chariot hurl to battle 10 but they have tail like the tail of scorpion and there be sting in their tail for at their first deal with any they appear not harmful to they that hear they and believe they but the effect and end of their practice be poison to the soul and thereafter their tail be like unto the tail of scorpion wherein be their sting and they have power to trouble and harm man the space of five month for as I show you before that they shall torment man the space of five month to wit a certain space appoint they so now I assure you to your comfort that as grassehopper last but five month that be hot so these shall be like unto grassehopper in that as well as in the rest for they shall remain but for a certain space prescribe and then shall be destroy by the blast of Christ breath 11 they have also a king but to rule over they who be the angel of the bottomless pit and his name in Hebrew be Abaddon and in greek apollyon for these by the permission of God justice and work of Satan shall have at the last a monarch to be their head who shall be like unto themselves the angel or messenger come to wit instruct and inspire by Satan to be his ambassador and to teach his false doctrine to the counterfeit church as well as the true pastor be the ambassador of God to the true church he be call Abaddon or apollyon because as he be both a spiritual and civil monarch so he destroy and kill both body and soul as I tell you in the four seal where he be call death for the same cause that he be call here destroyer 12 one woe be past and lo two come after for this which by the five trumpet be declare be the first of the three last and great plague whereunto I wish you to take special heed and therefore take good heed to the other two blast of the trumpet that follow 13 then the six angel blow and I hear a voice come from among the four horn of the golden altar that stand ever before the eye of God say these word to the next angel that have a trumpet loose these four angel bind at the great water Euphrates 14 now the summons and warning be give by the six blast of the trumpet of the six and fearful plague that be to come this command of Christ which be the voice here mention come to the six angel command he to do as you now have hear for although the trumpet be already blow yet the execution follow not while Christ command and permit it for these four angel mention here be the same who be stand before upon the four airth of the earth ready to destroy the same who be then as you hear stay by Christ while first he have seal his own who now be all seal because this be the last plague that be to come upon the world except that of the consummation Christ therefore command they to be loose for they be before stay as it be bind to the effect they may now put in execution these thing which they be ready to do when they be stay it be say they be bind at the great river Euphrates allude hereby to the history of Balthasar in Daniel for as Euphrates divide Babylon from the persian and the assyrian which they cross when they slay Balthasar so this command of stay give to these angel by Christ be that great river Euphrates beyond the which they be bind for they have no power to cross it and to plague the world while first all his choose be seal and that he have loose and permit they as by this command here be do 15 and so these four angel be loose who be ready at the hour the day the month and the year to slay the three part of man to wit they be ready at the very moment prescribe to they by God to destroy all man except such as be seal over who they have no power and such as be reserve to the destruction of the last plague to wit the consummation and so the three part be leave to they to destroy now follow the plague of the six trumpet 16 and first I see a army of horseman the number whereof be two hundred thousand thousand for I hear the number reckon this double great number signify that there shall be raise up at one time two great monarchy and seat of tyrant one rule in the east and another in the west who shall cruel persecute the church 17 and in this vision likewise I see horse who rider have brestplate of fire of hyacinth and brimstone and the head of the horse be like the head of lion and from their mouth come fire smoke and brimstone note that with fiery rage smoky pride and pretence and loathsome and wicked course these two monarch the one secular the other ecclesiastical shall conquer and possess the great part of the world these horse be a part yet not the least part of the force of one of these monarch in who description it be most insist because he be the destroyer of who it be speak in the five trumpet where he be name Abaddon these horse and their rider be the last order and sect of his ecclesiastical swarm their brestplate to wit their worldly defence be compose of fire that be persecution of the body for they shall have great credit at the hand of prince than all these grasshopper speak of in the five seal and so shall use their force to defend themselves therewith they be compose of the hyacinth for as this herb be dark and of a smoke colour and bitter to the taste so shall they be defend and maintain by the craft of their dark and bitter heresy which in the three trumpet be call wormwood as here they be call hyacynth and they be compose of brimstone which signify the loathsomeness and stench of sin and the flame and force of hell fire to wit Satan the author of the one and ruler of the other shall by all manner of craft defend they as his special instrument and the last vermin breed and come up from the smoke of the bottomless pit and they shall not only have power to defend themselves by these three mean but they shall also pursue and persecute the faithful which be mean by their horse head like to the head of lion that be able to devour the mean whereby they devour be the same whereby they defend themselves to wit by the power of prince to persecute the body by false and heretical brag and sleight which be here call smoke and by the drift and fraud of Satan in diverse fashion to deceive and inflame the soul which craft of Satan be here resemble to brimstone 18 by these three plague be slay the three part of man to wit by fire smoke and brimstone which come out of their mouth to wit their malice and strength shall be so great as they shall use all mean wherewith the three part of man shall be destroy although these mean shall not be use by they only to work this great destruction with 19 for their strength be not in their mouth only as you have present hear but it be also in their tail for their tail be like the tail of serpent have sting whereby they do harm in this they shall be like unto the grasshopper 20 but not the less the wicked shall be so hard heart as the rest of they who be not destroy by the plague of this trumpet shall not repent nor desist from the workmanship of their hand to wit from idolatry and adore of devil and of image of gold of silver of brass of stone and of wood who neither can see hear nor go whereof this heretical monarch be the punishment 21 nor yet will they repent they nor desist from break the second table by slaughter sorcery fornication and theft whereof that other monarch who only persecute the body be the revenge scourge and plague chap. x. argument John hear the explication of these mystery which be write upon the back of the book it be not lawful to he to manifest it by foreknow thing to come which be signify by swallow the book he be move to a great joy in the instant time but it turn in great bitterness to he thereafter then I see another strong angel come down from heaven he be clothe with a cloud and at his head be the rainbow and his face be like the sun and his foot like the pillar of fire this strong angel be Christ clothe with a cloud for in a cloud he ascend and in the cloud shall he come again at the latter day which cloud be a guide to the people of Israel by day while they travail through the wilderness and out of that cloud he pour the rain and dew of his grace in abundance upon his choose his head be clothe with the rainbow which signify his covenant he make with his elect as you hear before his face be like the sun and his foot like pillar of fire you hear these two describe in the begin of my epistle @ and he have in his hand a open book this be the book of the evangel or glad tiding and he set his right foot or strong on the sea to make stable that liquid element so unstable of nature and his left upon the earth which be soon make firm by this to show the power he have over all thing contain in they who have no power to pass the bound and order which he have prescribe unto they and therefore the earth be call his footstool by David in his psalm @ and he cry with a mighty voice like a roar lion for they be terrible thing and great which he be to denounce @ and when he have cry the seven thunder speak their voice these be the seven spirit of God who by his direction do speak and I be to have write what they do speak of purpose to have set it down with the rest but I hear a voice from heaven say seal what the seven thunder have speak but write they not for the holy spirit have declare unto i by they the exposition of the six trumpet the voice of God command i not to manifest that unto the world with the rest but by seal of it to keep it close unto the due time @ and the angel to wit Christ who I see stand on the sea and on the earth lift up his hand towards heaven @ and swear by he that create heaven the earth the sea and all that be in they that the time shall be no long @ but in the day of the seven angel voice when he begin to blow the mystery of God shall be consummate according as he tell to his servant the prophet this oath he make to assure i that the world shall end immediate after the accomplish of these thing mention in the six trumpet and that the seven declare the thing which be to be do at the consummation the form whereof will be as he have declare to his prophet @ then that voice which I hear speak to i from heaven to wit the voice of God the father speak again unto i and say go and take that open book which be in the hand of the angel who stand on the sea and the earth @ and so I go unto the angel and desire he to give i the book and he answer take and swallow it and it shall bring a bitterness unto thy belly but in thy mouth it shall be as sweet as honey 10 then I take the book and find that which he say to i of it to be true for indeed I think it delightful unto i to know the mystery of God by swallow the book and so it be sweet in my mouth but so soon as by the digestion hereof I must preach it to the world and for that cause become to be hate contemn and persecute by the wicked and see but a small increase of my great labour then sure it will be bitter to my belly as it be to jonas and shall be to all the true preacher thereof thereafter 11 then he say unto i thou must prophesy again before people nation tongue and many king for my child in Christ to wit my successor in doctrine who shall be in the time of these plague shall have the same commission to teach over again the same evangel to the salvation of all the believer these shall have such boldness give unto they as they shall constant declare their commission not only before the people but even before many king and shall not be afraid of their face chap. 11 argument Babylon the pope empire be the outward part of the temple the true church be in but under the persecution of these hypocrite for a certain space faithful pastor be send from time to time to witness the truth they be persecute condemn and slay by Antichrist God raise up at the last strong preacher who shall describe the popedom and foretell the destruction thereof in the seven trumpet be the day of judgement describe and then be a long reed like a rod give unto i and the angel who give i the book stand before i and say arise and measure the temple of God and the altar and all they that adore in it with that reed that be give thou @ but the court that be without the temple exclude thou and measure it not for it be give unto the gentile who shall tread down the holy city for the space of two and forty month now lest I shall despair of any profit which my successor can have make in doctrine in their time because as it appear by the six trumpet the whole world shall be subdue to these two monarchy Christ aswell to assure i some shall still remain pure and unspotted as also to show i and by i to forewarn the church that this most dangerous monarch call apollyon shall corporal succeed in the church and shall sit in the temple of God give i a reed for that cause and command i to measure the temple for he will save all they that be of the true church for they be the inward part of the temple and the rest by reason of their hypocrisy shall be account of as gentile and this division shall be make by my successor in doctrine of who I speak already for they by the measure and trial of the word signify by the reed shall separate that holy from the rest of the outward temple of God to wit the hypocritical and antichristian church which shall tread down and persecute the true church for the space of two and forty month or three year and a half for it be both one number this space prescribe by Christ allude to daniel prophecy of two time a time and half a time for as Daniel mean thereby the half of his prophetical week so Christ mean by this that the persecution of this destroyer shall last the half to wit it shall reign about the midst of the last age of this whole week which begin at his incarnation and first come and end at his last come again which because it be the last period it be here compare to a week @ but I shall give that holy town to two witness of i who clothe with sackcloth shall prophesy the space of one thousand two hundred and threescore day for these my successor he shall raise up as witness to wit a sufficient number of they for out of the mouth of two or three witness every word be confirm to witness that their doctrine be false who persecute the church which he shall give unto they for he shall make they their patron to defend and feed they by the power of the true word and they shall preach repentance to that counterfeit church and therefore they be say to be clothe in sackcloth and to assure we to our great comfort that in all the time of blindness God shall ever be raise up some of these two witness against the hypocritical destroyer and to comfort and confirm his true church it be say they shall prophesy the number of day that you have hear which be correspondent just to the month before mention to wit they shall not leave off to witness all the time of the antichristian kingdom @ these witnesness be two green olive who anoint the elect with that holy oil and two candlestick as Christ say to enlighten the world with their brightness who be set down and do their office in the presence of he who be lord and ruler of the earth @ and if any shall press to harm they fire shall come out of their mouth and devour their enemy for whosoever will do they any hurt himself must be slay so to wit the holy spirit who be the fire in their mouth shall accuse and cause to be destroy with the second death all they that either persecute they or will not hear or obey their doctrine @ these witness have power to shut heaven that it rain not in the day of their prophecy and they have power over the water to turn they into blood and to strike the earth with every kind of plague so often as they please for he shall authorize they and their message with as sure testimony as the shut of the heaven and stay of the rain be unto Elias so long as he forspeak it shall be so and as unto Moses the turn of the water into blood and the strike of the earth of the land of Egypt with diverse and sundry plague @ but these shall be witness by their death as well as by their life for how soon any of they shall have run that course in the earth which God have appoint they they shall be persecute overcome and slay by that beast the angel of that bottomless pit and king of the locust and that great town and seat of the monarchy shall public put they down as malefactor @ so as their dead body or carkeise shall lie in the street thereof and this town be spiritual call Sodom because of the spiritual adultery to wit idolatry that it shall commit and maintain and spiritual Egypt because it shall oppress and intolerable burden the soul of the choose even as Egypt captivate the body and burden the back of the people of Israel and in that town also be our lord crucify for where Christ member be put to death for their master cause as this town and king thereof shall do there be Christ himself crucify in effect and his crucify shall be as well impute to they as to judas who betray he @ and man of all tribe people tongue and nation shall see their carkeise the space of three day and a half and they shall not be suffer to be bury in sepulcher 10 and the inhabitant of the earth shall be glad and rejoice for their slaughter and shall send gift one to another in token of joy because they be make quit of these two prophet who torment the indweller of the earth for the whole world who be not in Sancto shall not only suffer but allow that these witness be not only slay but also be so cruel use a contemn as not to be suffer to be bury among other and the whole earth shall rejoice at their death because that even as Achab blame Elias for trouble of Israel so shall the world think these witness troublesome unto they because they discover unto they their shamefulness and call they to the repentance thereof 11 and thus shall they be contemn for the space of three day and a half to wit of three year and a half which signify that during the space of the antichrist reign they shall be thus use but after the space of three day and a half the spirit of life come from God shall enter into they and they shall be set upon their foot and a great fear shall fall upon they that do see they before 12 and they hear a great voice from the heaven say unto they come up bither than they ascend up into heaven and their enemy see they do so for although that during the flourish of this heretical and bypocriticall monarchy the true pastor no soon appear than they be put to death yet at the last this monarchy shall begin to decay when the three year or the three day and a half thereof shall be expire and then shall the spirit of life from God to wit the holy spirit send from God work mighty in the latter pastor of these day so as in they shall the bypass martyr be revive and their doctrine shall take root in the heart of many and their reason shall be so pithy as the antichristian sect and the rest of the world shall know as perfect that they shall prevail as if they hear God call they to heaven to reward they there for their victory neither shall they have power of their life for God shall move the heart of many to defend they in such glory and safety as if they be mount up to heaven in a cloud and they not able to hinder they 13 and then at that time shall be a great earthquake to wit great tumult among nation and the ten part of the city shall fall this city be divide in ten part to show it be the same monarchy that shall afterward be describe by a beast with ten head and by the fall of the ten part thereof be mean that diverse nation shall shake off the yoke of that monarchy and so a part of the strength of that city shall decay and there be slay in that earthquake seven thousand man to wit a great number of man shall be slay in these tumult and the rest be afraid and give glory unto the god of heaven for these tumult and judgement of God shall by their terror reduce some to the knowledge of the truth 14 the second woe be past for these be the plague of the six trumpet and lo the three woe come soon for next follow the declaration of these day wherein the consummation shall be first of that antichristian kingdom and next of the whole earth take therefore good heed unto the three woe for it be the last 15 then the seven angel blow and there be great voice in heaven say the kingdom of the world be make the kingdom of our lord and of his Christ who shall reign for ever and ever this joyful cry be in heaven because the day be come wherein the day of judgement shall be and so the power be to be take from the king of the earth who be enemy to the saint and Christ be hereafter to be the great sole and immediate king over all 16 then the four and twenty elder who sit upon seat in the sight and presence of God for joy that the salvation of their brother be at hand do fall upon their face and adore God say 17 we thank thou lord God almighty who be and who be and who art present to come again because now thou be to make thy great power manifest and be to begin thy glorious kingdom 18 and the gentile wax wrathful for all the wicked now perceive that neither their force nor craft can avail for thy wrath be now come which none may resist and the time of the dead be come for now all the dead be to be judge and thou be to reward thy servant the prophet and all the saint and all that fear thy name small or great and thou be to destroy they that destroy the earth by the persecute of thy saint and defile it with every sort of vice 19 then the temple of God be open in heaven that the ark of his covenant may be see which be within it God now do show the ark of his covenant to assure all the saint that he will now have mind of his promise and according thereto will present send down Christ to judge the earth as be do then in all terror which be signify by lightning voice thunder and earthquake which then be make and a great hail which signify the destruction of the earth as shower of hail of all other be the most harmful and destroy chap. 12 argument a new vision the devil malice against Christ and his church the church by God providence escape his fury she be secret and lie hide for a space the devil raise up heresy and persecution to destroy she but all that can prevail whereupon he go to raise up her great enemy the pope now as this seven seal wherein these seven trumpet be which you have present hear declare be no other thing but the more ample dilate of the six former seal as I do show before so this vision which I be next to declare unto you be nothing else but a clear set forth and forewarn of these time which be most perilous for the church of all they which be to come after especial of the three last woe @ and there be a great sign and a wonder vision see in heaven to wit a woman clothe with the sun and the moon be under her foot and she have a crown of twelve star upon her head @ and she be great with child and she be so near her childbirth as she be already cry and be sore pain with the travel to be deliver of her child @ and there be also another sign and wonder see in heaven a great red dragon have seven head and ten horn and upon his head seven diamond @ and his tail draw the three part of the star of heaven with he and do cast they down to the earth this dragon stand before the woman await to devour her birth so soon as she be deliver of it @ but she bring forth a man-child who be to rule all nation with a rod of iron and her son be catch up to God and his throne @ but the woman flee into the wilderness where she have a place prepare by God that she may be feed angel can not obtain the victory but by the contrary their place be no more find in heaven @ and so that great dragon to wit that old serpent who be call the devil and Satan who seduce the whole face of the earth be cast down to the earth and all his angel be cast down with he 10 and I hear a voice in heaven say now be wrought the health the virtue and the kingdom of our god and the power of his Christ for the accuser of our brother be cast down who day and night accuse they in the sight of our god 11 for they that fight with he have overcome he for the love they bear unto the lamb and his blood and to the word of his testimony and have prodigal give their life even unto death for that cause 12 therefore rejoice you heaven and you that dwell therein but woe to the inhabitant of the earth and the sea for the devil be come down to you and he be full of great wrath because he have but a short space to reign 13 and when the dragon see himself cast down upon the earth he pursue the woman who have bear the manchild 14 but there be give to the woman two great eagle wing that she may flee from the sight of the serpent into the wilderness to the place that be there appoint for she to be nourish for a time and time and half a time 15 then the serpent do cast out of his mouth after the woman to overtake she a water like a great flood to carry she away perforce 16 but the earth help the woman and open her mouth and swallow up by the way the great flood which the dragon have cast out of his mouth this part of the vision be to declare unto i that howsoever the church which be in all brightness and innocence which be represent by her garment of the sun and tread under foot and contemn the world and the vanity thereof here signify by the moon be under her foot a planet that have no proper but a borrow light and subject to all mutability like the world and be crown with the shine glory of the twelve patriarch and prophet and the twelve holy apostle succeed they in the
